questionText: Provide details of the climate-related targets for your portfolio.
questionKo: the climate-related 목표 for your 포트폴리오.에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: Achieving net zero by 2050 will require a major redirection of capital into sustainable solutions and low-carbon technologies, which only the financial services sector can provide. This profound influence on the wider economy means financial institutions' climate-related impact occurs mostly in their portfolios, rather than through their direct operations. Thus, setting targets and reporting on progress at a portfolio level is considered best practice for financial institutions and can help them align their financing, investment and insurance underwriting to a 1.5ºC world.

columns.text: Provide details of your target and metrics
columns.textKo: your 목표 및 metrics에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.

columns.text: Please explain target coverage and identify any exclusions
columns.textKo: Please explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항

columns.text: Methodology used when setting the target
columns.textKo: 방법론 used 경우 setting the 목표

columns.text: Target is set and progress against it is tracked at
columns.textKo: 목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Portfolio target" in response to 7.53.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "포트폴리오 목표" in response to 7.53.

guidance.text:
Target reference number (column 1) 
Select a unique target reference from the drop-down menu provided to identify the target in subsequent questions and to track progress against the target in subsequent reporting years. 
Target type (column 2) 
Select which type of target you have implemented for your portfolio. 
Green finance: refers to the aim of providing loans, investments and/or other financial products and services to green projects. 
Sectoral Decarbonization Approach (SDA): a method for setting physical intensity targets that uses convergence of emissions intensity. 
Portfolio coverage: a method for setting target to drive the adoption of science-based emissions reduction targets by borrowers and/or investees. 
Portfolio temperature alignment: a method that enables financial institutions to set targets to align their base year portfolio temperature score to a long-term temperature goal. 
Portfolio emissions: setting targets to reduce absolute portfolio emissions or emissions intensity
Weighted average carbon intensity: a target on the weighted average carbon intensity (WACI), which is the weighted sum of carbon emissions per million of revenue. 
Engagement target: implies targeted engagement with the highest emitting assets in an investor's portfolio. The engagement threshold target should ensure that at least 70% of financed emissions in material sectors are either net zero, aligned with a net zero pathway, or are the subject of engagement and stewardship actions (either direct or collective). This target is supported by other tools IIGCC has released including the Net Zero Stewardship Toolkit 
Adaptation and resilience target: setting a target for aligning finance with adaptation and climate-resilient development. 
Taxonomy or framework used to define "green finance" (column 3) 
This column is only presented if you have selected "Green finance" in column 2 "Target type". 
Date target was set (column 5) 
Enter the date on which your company set the target. 
This must be either before or during the reporting year but cannot be after the reporting year or after the end date of the target. 
If you have a year-on-year rolling target, enter the date your company first set the target. This can be before the base year. 
If you set the target based on financial years, enter the date that applies to the end of your company's financial year and specify this in the "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions" column. 
If you do not know the exact date on which your company set the target, enter the end of the year that the target was set. 
If you are reporting a science-based target that has been revised, the date the target was set should refer to the date the target was revised rather than the date the original target was set. 
Target is set and progress against it is tracked at (column 6) 
Indicate whether your target refers to a portfolio, a specific sector or specific asset class(es). 
For example, if your portfolio target concerns companies in specific sectors (i.e. sector decarbonization approach), and select which sector it relates to in column 7 "Sector". 
Your selection here will drive the options presented in subsequent columns. 
Sector (column 7) 
This column is only presented if you selected "Sector level" in column 6 "Target is set and progress against it is tracked at". 
Select one sector per row and add rows if disclosing on multiple sectors.
Portfolios covered by the target (column 8) 
This column is only presented if your target is set on a sector level and refers to a specific sector, driven by selecting "Sector level" in column 6 "Target is set and progress against it is tracked at". 
See Explanation of Terms for definition of "Portfolio". 
Portfolio (column 9) 
The options in this column are driven by your selections in 1.10. 
This column only appears if your target refers to a specific portfolio or asset classes. 
Asset classes covered by the target (column 10) 
Select all of the asset classes covered by the target you are reporting. 
If the target also covers asset classes not listed, use the "Other, please specify" option and provide the name of the asset class. 
Sectors covered by the target (column 11) 
Select all of the sectors included within the target. 
Select "All sectors" if your portfolio target concerns all your clients/investees.
This column is only presented when "Portfolio level" or "Asset class level" is selected in column 6 "Target is set and progress against it is tracked at".
Target type: Absolute or intensity (column 12) 
This column only appears if "Green finance", "Sectoral Decarbonization Approach (SDA)", "Portfolio emissions ", "Weighted average carbon intensity", "Engagement target" or "Other, please specify" is selected in column 2 "Target type".
Select whether the target is an absolute target or an intensity target, e.g., targets related to tCO2e are absolute targets, whereas targets related to an intensity metric such as tCO2e/kWh are intensity targets. 
If you select "absolute", note that CDP is requesting data on gross emissions. Gross means total emissions before any deductions or other adjustments are made to take account of offset credits, avoided emissions from the use of goods and services and/or reductions attributable to the sequestration or transfer of GHGs. If you have a target that will be met in part by offsetting (including carbon neutrality targets), only the proportion of the target that relates to emissions reductions (and not offset purchases) should be considered here. 
Emissions scopes of portfolio companies covered by the target (column 13) 
This column only appears if "Portfolio temperature rating target" is selected in column 2 "Target type". 
% of portfolio emissions covered by the target (column 14) 
Enter the percentage of total emissions in the portfolio selected in column 9 that is covered by the target. E.g., if a banking portfolio is selected in column 8 "Portfolios covered by the target", the company should report the percentage of total banking portfolio emissions covered by the target. 
If you are reporting a sector level target, and it covers multiple portfolios, enter the percentage of total emissions in the portfolios selected in column 8 "Portfolios covered by the target". 
% of asset class emissions covered by the target (column 15) 
If your target covers only one type of asset class, enter the percentage of total emissions in the asset class selected in column 10 "Asset classes covered by the target". 
Target denominator (column 17) 
This column only appears if "Intensity" is selected in column 12 "Target type: Absolute or intensity".
The dropdowns which appear are based on the selection made in column 2 "Target type".
If you select "Other, please specify," provide a label for the metric.
% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value (column 18) 
Enter the percentage of portfolio value covered by the target to the total portfolio value based on assets value as reported in 1.10. 
Frequency of target reviews (column 21) 
Select the frequency for how often you review your target. 
End date of base year (column 22) 
The base year is the year against which you are comparing your emissions reduction target. 
The base year cannot be after the reporting year. 
If you have a year-on-year rolling target, the end date of the base year will be within the previous reporting year. 
If you have a target based on financial years, enter the date that applies to the end of your financial year and specify this in column 36 "Provide details of your target and metrics". 
If you have a target based on average emissions over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end of the average period and specify this in the column 36 "Provide details of your target and metrics". 
Figure in base year (column 23) 
Enter the measured figure in the base year against which progress towards the target is measured. 
The figure provided should be in the metric (or target numerator if intensity) provided in column 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)". 
If your target is an intensity target, note that the intensity figure should be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the target by the intensity metric denominator, as selected in columns 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)" and 17 "Target denominator". 
End of interim target year (column 25) 
If you have an interim target, enter the target date of the interim target. 
If you set the target based on financial years, enter the date that applies to the end of your company's financial year and specify this in the "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions" column. 
Figure in interim target year (column 26) 
Enter the figure in the interim year covered by the target. 
If the interim year is in the past, enter the measured figure. 
If the interim year is in the future, enter the figure you expect to achieve in the interim year. 
The figure provided should be in the metric (or target numerator if intensity) provided in column 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)". 
If your target is an intensity target, note that the intensity figure should be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the target by the intensity metric denominator, as selected in columns 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)" and 17 "Target denominator". 
End date of target (column 27) 
Enter the date that the target ends. For example, if the target is to reduce emissions intensity by 50% by the end of 2030, the end date of the target is 31st December 2030. 
If you have a year-on-year rolling target, the end date of the target will be within the reporting year. 
If you have a target based on financial years, enter the date that applies to the end of your financial year and specify in the column 36 "Provide details of your target and metrics". 
If you have a target based on average emissions over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end of the average period and specify this in the column 36 "Provide details of your target and metrics". 
You should not report any target that was achieved before the start of the reporting year. 
Figure in target year (column 28) 
Enter the targeted figure you expect to achieve in target year. 
The figure provided should be in the metric (or target numerator if intensity) provided in column 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)". 
If your target is an intensity target, note that the intensity figure should be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the target by the intensity metric denominator, as selected in columns 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)" and 17 "Target denominator". 
Figure in reporting year (column 29) 
Enter the corresponding figure in the reporting year covered by the target. 
The figure provided should be in the metric (or target numerator if intensity) provided in column 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)". 
If your target is an intensity target, note that the intensity figure should be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the target by the intensity metric denominator, as selected in columns 16 "Metric (or target numerator if intensity)" and 17 "Target denominator". 
% of target achieved relative to base year (column 30) 
This column is auto-calculated based on your responses in columns 23 "Figure in base year", 28 "Figure in target year" and 29 "Figure in reporting year". 
Target status in reporting year (column 31) 
New - Select this option for targets that have been set in the reporting year and are still in progress. 
Underway - Select this option for targets that were set before the reporting year, with a target year in the future, that have not been achieved and continue to be pursued. 
Achieved - Select this option for targets that have been achieved or exceeded in the reporting year. 
Expired - Select this option for targets with a target year of the reporting year, that have not been achieved and have therefore expired in the reporting year. 
Revised - Select this option for targets that were set before the reporting year but a revision has been made to any of the elements in columns 2 "Target type" to 14 "% of portfolio emissions covered by the target " in the reporting year, for example due to a recalculation of the base year emissions intensity or a change to the end date of the target. Note that the target status should be reported as "revised" only for the reporting year when the update was conducted. 
Replaced - Select this option for previously reported targets that have been replaced with another target in the reporting year, for example where a facility target has been incorporated into an organization-wide target. 
Retired - Select this option for targets with a target year in the future, that have not been achieved, but will no longer be pursued. Provide more information as to why this target was retired in the "Please explain (including target coverage)" column. 
Aggregation weighting used (column 32) 
This column only appears if "Portfolio coverage" or "Portfolio temperature rating target" is selected in column 2 "Target type". 
If you disclose a Portfolio coverage or Portfolio temperature alignment target, select the aggregation weighting used. 
Weighted average temperature score (WATS): Temperature scores are allocated based on portfolio weights. 
Total emissions weighted temperature score (TETS): Temperature scores are allocated based on historical emission weights using total company emissions. 
Market owned emissions weighted temperature score (MOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on an equity ownership approach. 
Enterprise owned emissions weighted temperature score (EOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on an enterprise ownership approach. 
EV + cash emissions weighted temperature score (ECOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on an enterprise value (EV) plus cash & equivalents ownership approach. 
Total assets emissions weighted temperature score (AOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on a total assets ownership approach. 
Revenue owned emissions weighted temperature score (ROTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on the share of revenue. 
If you select "Other, please specify", specify the aggregation weighting used. 
% of the temperature score calculated in the reporting year based on company targets (column 33) 
This column only appears if you selected "Portfolio temperature rating target" as target type in column 2 "Target type". 
Indicate the proportion of the temperature score calculated in the reporting year based on company targets (i.e. not based on a default score for the company). 
This column is only relevant for portfolio temperature alignment targets. Further guidance on these and the process of setting a portfolio temperature alignment target can be found in the SBTi ‘ Financial-Sector-Science-Based-Targets-Guidance ' (see page 85). 
Is this a science-based target? (column 34) 
This column only appears if "Banking" or "Investing" is selected in either columns 8 "Portfolios covered by the target" or 9 "Portfolio". 
Refer to the CDP Technical Note on Science-Based Targets for what qualifies as a science-based target and how to assess your target against the Science Based Targets initiative's criteria. 
Yes, and this target has been approved by the Science Based Targets initiative - Companies are very strongly encouraged to have their targets officially evaluated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). CDP considers targets approved by the initiative to reflect best practice in science-based target setting. Select this option only if the target has been officially approved by the SBTi by the CDP scoring deadline. 
Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and the target is currently being reviewed by the Science Based Targets initiative - If your company has set a target and has self-assessed it to be science-based, and it has been submitted to the SBTi for validation and is currently being reviewed by the SBTi, you should select this option. You should use the "Please explain target coverage and identify any exclusions" column to explain why you believe your target to be science-based. 
Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and we have committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative in the next two years - Not all companies have had their target assessed by the SBTi. If your company has set a target and has self-assessed it to be science-based but has not yet submitted it to the SBTi for validation, you should select this option. You should use the "Please explain target coverage and identify any exclusions" column to explain why you believe your target to be science-based. If you are currently in the process of revising your target to meet SBTi criteria, indicate this by selecting "No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years." 
Yes, we consider this a science-based target, it has been set in line with the Glasgow Financial Alliance for Net Zero (GFANZ) commitments, and we have committed to seek validation by, or it is currently being reviewed by, the Science Based Targets initiative - Many financial institutions committed to accelerating the decarbonization of the economy do so by joining the GFANZ coalition and by primarily setting targets based on the GFANZ commitments. If your company has set such a target and has self-assessed it to be science-based, and it has been submitted to the SBTi for validation, or you are in the process of doing so, you should select this option. 
Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and it has been set in line with the Glasgow Financial Alliance for Net Zero (GFANZ) commitments, but we have not committed to seek validation by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years - Many financial institutions committed to accelerating the decarbonization of the economy do so by joining the GFANZ coalition and by primarily setting targets based on the GFANZ commitments. If your company has set such a target and has self-assessed it to be science-based, but you have not committed to seek validation by SBTi, you should select this option. 
No, but we are reporting another target that is science-based - Another target (absolute or intensity) disclosed is science-based, either in another row in this table, or in 7.53.2. 
No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years - It is recommended that your company publicly states this by making a commitment via the SBTi Services Validation Portal. 
No, and we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years - No science-based targets have been set and there are no plans in place to set one in the next 2 years. 
Target ambition (column 35) 
This column only appears if you select any "Yes" option in column 34 "Is this a science-based target?". 
Select the level of ambition of your science-based target. Note that as of July 2021 the SBTi currently requires Scope 1 and 2 targets to be consistent with the level of decarbonization required to keep global temperature increase to 1.5°C compared to pre-industrial temperatures, and Scope 3 targets to be consistent with the level of decarbonization required to keep global temperature increase to well-below 2°C compared to pre-industrial temperatures. 
Provide details of your target and metrics (column 36) 
This column only appears if you select "Adaptation and resilience target" in column 2 "Target type". 
Provide the metric used for your target, as well as any other details. 
Provide how you measure progress against your target, what is the base year figure against which you compare. 
Figure in interim year, if applicable. 
Any other details you wish to provide. 
Please explain target coverage and identify any exclusions (column 37) 
Provide further details of your target coverage in this column and any exclusions. 
You can use this column to identify where you have a financial year or average year based target. 
If your target was originally in a different format, you may wish to give the original target before it was converted into the format required for the purposes of this table. 
If your target is part of a wider carbon neutrality goal, a regulatory requirement, or a longer-term target, you can also explain this here. 
Target objective (column 38) 
Describe the strategic objective for the target and how it links to your strategy. E.g. the objective of the target may be to meet a regulatory target or reduce the costs of compliance with an emissions trading scheme.
guidance.textKo: 목표 reference number (열 1) Select a unique 목표 reference from the drop-down menu 입력 to identify the 목표 in subsequent questions 및 to track progress against the 목표 in subsequent 보고연도s. 목표 type (열 2) Select which type of 목표 you have implemented 귀사의 포트폴리오. Green finance: refers to the aim of providing loans, investments 및/또는 other financial 제품 및 서비스 to green projects. Sectoral Decarbonization Approach (SDA): a method for setting physical intensity 목표 that uses convergence of 배출집약도. 포트폴리오 coverage: a method for setting 목표 to drive the adoption of science-based emissions reduction 목표 by bor행ers 및/또는 investees. 포트폴리오 temperature alignment: a method that enables financial institutions to set 목표 to align their 기준연도 포트폴리오 temperature score to a long-term temperature goal. 포트폴리오 emissions: setting 목표 to reduce absolute 포트폴리오 emissions 또는 배출집약도 Weighted average carbon intensity: a 목표 on the weighted average carbon intensity (WACI), which is the weighted sum of carbon emissions per million of 매출. Engagement 목표: implies 목표ed engagement with the highest emitting assets in an investor's 포트폴리오. The engagement threshold 목표 해야 합니다 ensure that 최소 70% of 금융배출량 in material sectors are either net zero, aligned with a net zero pathway, 또는 are the subject of engagement 및 stewardship actions (either direct 또는 collective). This 목표 is supported by other tools IIGCC has released 포함 the Net Zero Stewardship Toolkit Adaptation 및 resilience 목표: setting a 목표 for aligning finance with adaptation 및 climate-resilient development. Taxonomy 또는 framework used to define "green finance" (열 3) This 열 is only presented 만약 you have 선택 "Green finance" in 열 2 "목표 type". Date 목표 was set (열 5) Enter the date on which your company set the 목표. This 해야 합니다 be either before 또는 during the 보고연도 but cannot be after the 보고연도 또는 after the end date 의 목표. 만약 you have a year-on-year rolling 목표, enter the date your company first set the 목표. This can be before the 기준연도. 만약 you set the 목표 based on 재무연도s, enter the date that applies to the end of your company's 재무연도 및 specify this in the "Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항" 열. 만약 you do not know the exact date on which your company set the 목표, enter the end 의 year that the 목표 was set. 만약 you are reporting a science-based 목표 that has been revised, the date the 목표 was set 해야 합니다 refer to the date the 목표 was revised rather than the date the original 목표 was set. 목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at (열 6) Indicate whether your 목표 refers to a 포트폴리오, a specific sector 또는 specific asset class(es). For example, 만약 your 포트폴리오 목표 concerns companies in specific sectors (i.e. sector decarbonization approach), 및 select which sector it relates to in 열 7 "Sector". Your selection here will drive the options presented in subsequent 열. Sector (열 7) This 열 is only presented 만약 you 선택 "Sector level" in 열 6 "목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at". Select one sector per 행 및 add 행 만약 disclosing on multiple sectors. 포트폴리오s covered by the 목표 (열 8) This 열 is only presented 만약 your 목표 is set on a sector level 및 refers to a specific sector, driven by selecting "Sector level" in 열 6 "목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at". See Explanation of Terms for definition of "포트폴리오". 포트폴리오 (열 9) The options in this 열 are driven by your selections in 1.10. This 열 only appears 만약 your 목표 refers to a specific 포트폴리오 또는 asset classes. Asset classes covered by the 목표 (열 10) Select all 의 asset classes covered by the 목표 you are reporting. 만약 the 목표 also covers asset classes not listed, use the "Other, 직접 입력" option 및 provide the name 의 asset class. Sectors covered by the 목표 (열 11) Select all 의 sectors included within the 목표. Select "All sectors" 만약 your 포트폴리오 목표 concerns all your 고객/투자대상. This 열 is only presented 경우 "포트폴리오 level" 또는 "Asset class level" is 선택 in 열 6 "목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at". 목표 type: Absolute 또는 intensity (열 12) This 열 only appears 만약 "Green finance", "Sectoral Decarbonization Approach (SDA)", "포트폴리오 emissions ", "Weighted average carbon intensity", "Engagement 목표" 또는 "Other, 직접 입력" is 선택 in 열 2 "목표 type". Select whether the 목표 is an absolute 목표 또는 an intensity 목표, e.g., 목표 related to tCO2e are absolute 목표, whereas 목표 related to an intensity metric such as tCO2e/kWh are intensity 목표. 만약 you select "absolute", note that CDP is requesting data on gross emissions. Gross means total emissions before 하나 이상 deductions 또는 other adjustments are made to take account of offset credits, avoided emissions from the use of goods 및 services 및/또는 reductions attributable to the sequestration 또는 transfer of GHGs. 만약 you have a 목표 that will be met in part by offsetting (포함 carbon neutrality 목표), only the proportion 의 목표 that relates to emissions reductions (and not offset purchases) 해야 합니다 be considered here. Emissions scopes of 포트폴리오 companies covered by the 목표 (열 13) This 열 only appears 만약 "포트폴리오 temperature rating 목표" is 선택 in 열 2 "목표 type". % of 포트폴리오 emissions covered by the 목표 (열 14) Enter the percentage of total emissions in the 포트폴리오 선택 in 열 9 that is covered by the 목표. E.g., 만약 a banking 포트폴리오 is 선택 in 열 8 "포트폴리오s covered by the 목표", the company 해야 합니다 report the percentage of total banking 포트폴리오 emissions covered by the 목표. 만약 you are reporting a sector level 목표, 및 it covers multiple 포트폴리오s, enter the percentage of total emissions in the 포트폴리오s 선택 in 열 8 "포트폴리오s covered by the 목표". % of asset class emissions covered by the 목표 (열 15) 만약 your 목표 covers only one type of asset class, enter the percentage of total emissions in the asset class 선택 in 열 10 "Asset classes covered by the 목표". 목표 denominator (열 17) This 열 only appears 만약 "Intensity" is 선택 in 열 12 "목표 type: Absolute 또는 intensity". The dropdowns which appear are based on the selection made in 열 2 "목표 type". 만약 you select "Other, 직접 입력," provide a label 에 대한 metric. % of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value (열 18) Enter the percentage of 포트폴리오 value covered by the 목표 to the total 포트폴리오 value based on assets value as 보고 in 1.10. Frequency of 목표 reviews (열 21) Select the frequency for how often you review your 목표. End date of 기준연도 (열 22) The 기준연도 is the year against which you are comparing your emissions reduction 목표. The 기준연도 cannot be after the 보고연도. 만약 you have a year-on-year rolling 목표, the end date 의 기준연도 will be within the 이전 보고연도. 만약 you have a 목표 based on 재무연도s, enter the date that applies to the end of your 재무연도 및 specify this in 열 36 "세부 정보를 입력 of your 목표 및 metrics". 만약 you have a 목표 based on average emissions over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end 의 average period 및 specify this in the 열 36 "세부 정보를 입력 of your 목표 및 metrics". Figure in 기준연도 (열 23) Enter the measured figure in the 기준연도 against which progress towards the 목표 is measured. The figure 입력 해야 합니다 be in the metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity) 입력 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)". 만약 your 목표 is an intensity 목표, note that the intensity figure 해야 합니다 be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the 목표 by the intensity metric denominator, as 선택 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)" 및 17 "목표 denominator". End of interim 목표 year (열 25) 만약 you have an interim 목표, enter the 목표 date 의 interim 목표. 만약 you set the 목표 based on 재무연도s, enter the date that applies to the end of your company's 재무연도 및 specify this in the "Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항" 열. Figure in interim 목표 year (열 26) Enter the figure in the interim year covered by the 목표. 만약 the interim year is in the past, enter the measured figure. 만약 the interim year is in the future, enter the figure you expect to achieve in the interim year. The figure 입력 해야 합니다 be in the metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity) 입력 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)". 만약 your 목표 is an intensity 목표, note that the intensity figure 해야 합니다 be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the 목표 by the intensity metric denominator, as 선택 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)" 및 17 "목표 denominator". End date of 목표 (열 27) Enter the date that the 목표 ends. For example, 만약 the 목표 is to reduce 배출집약도 by 50% by the end of 2030, the end date 의 목표 is 31st December 2030. 만약 you have a year-on-year rolling 목표, the end date 의 목표 will be within the 보고연도. 만약 you have a 목표 based on 재무연도s, enter the date that applies to the end of your 재무연도 및 specify in the 열 36 "세부 정보를 입력 of your 목표 및 metrics". 만약 you have a 목표 based on average emissions over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end 의 average period 및 specify this in the 열 36 "세부 정보를 입력 of your 목표 및 metrics". You 해야 합니다 not report 하나 이상 목표 that was achieved before the start 의 보고연도. Figure in 목표 year (열 28) Enter the 목표ed figure you expect to achieve in 목표 year. The figure 입력 해야 합니다 be in the metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity) 입력 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)". 만약 your 목표 is an intensity 목표, note that the intensity figure 해야 합니다 be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the 목표 by the intensity metric denominator, as 선택 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)" 및 17 "목표 denominator". Figure in 보고연도 (열 29) Enter the corresponding figure in the 보고연도 covered by the 목표. The figure 입력 해야 합니다 be in the metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity) 입력 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)". 만약 your 목표 is an intensity 목표, note that the intensity figure 해야 합니다 be calculated by dividing the emissions covered by the 목표 by the intensity metric denominator, as 선택 in 열 16 "Metric (or 목표 numerator 만약 intensity)" 및 17 "목표 denominator". % of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도 (열 30) This 열 is auto-calculated based on your responses in 열 23 "Figure in 기준연도", 28 "Figure in 목표 year" 및 29 "Figure in 보고연도". 목표 status in 보고연도 (열 31) New - Select this option for 목표 that have been set in the 보고연도 및 are still in progress. Underway - Select this option for 목표 that were set before the 보고연도, with a 목표 year in the future, that have not been achieved 및 continue to be pursued. Achieved - Select this option for 목표 that have been achieved 또는 exceeded in the 보고연도. Expired - Select this option for 목표 with a 목표 year 의 보고연도, that have not been achieved 및 have therefore expired in the 보고연도. Revised - Select this option for 목표 that were set before the 보고연도 but a revision has been made to 하나 이상 의 elements in 열 2 "목표 type" to 14 "% of 포트폴리오 emissions covered by the 목표 " in the 보고연도, for example due to a recalculation 의 기준연도 배출집약도 또는 a change to the end date 의 목표. Note that the 목표 status 해야 합니다 be 보고 as "revised" only 에 대한 보고연도 경우 the update was conducted. Replaced - Select this option for previously 보고 목표 that have been replaced with another 목표 in the 보고연도, for example 여기서 a facility 목표 has been incorporated into an organization-wide 목표. Retired - Select this option for 목표 with a 목표 year in the future, that have not been achieved, but will no longer be pursued. Provide more information as to why this 목표 was retired in the "Please explain (포함 목표 coverage)" 열. Aggregation weighting used (열 32) This 열 only appears 만약 "포트폴리오 coverage" 또는 "포트폴리오 temperature rating 목표" is 선택 in 열 2 "목표 type". 만약 you disclose a 포트폴리오 coverage 또는 포트폴리오 temperature alignment 목표, select the aggregation weighting used. Weighted average temperature score (WATS): Temperature scores are allocated based on 포트폴리오 weights. Total emissions weighted temperature score (TETS): Temperature scores are allocated based on historical emission weights using total company emissions. Market owned emissions weighted temperature score (MOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on an equity ownership approach. Enterprise owned emissions weighted temperature score (EOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on an enterprise ownership approach. EV + cash emissions weighted temperature score (ECOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on an enterprise value (EV) plus cash & equivalents ownership approach. Total assets emissions weighted temperature score (AOTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on a total assets ownership approach. 매출 owned emissions weighted temperature score (ROTS): Temperature scores are allocated based on the share of 매출. 만약 you select "Other, 직접 입력", specify the aggregation weighting used. % 의 temperature score calculated in the 보고연도 based on company 목표 (열 33) This 열 only appears 만약 you 선택 "포트폴리오 temperature rating 목표" as 목표 type in 열 2 "목표 type". Indicate the proportion 의 temperature score calculated in the 보고연도 based on company 목표 (i.e. not based on a default score 에 대한 company). This 열 is only relevant for 포트폴리오 temperature alignment 목표. Further guidance on these 및 the 프로세스 of setting a 포트폴리오 temperature alignment 목표 can be found in the SBTi ‘ Financial-Sector-Science-Based-목표-Guidance ' (see page 85). Is this a science-based 목표? (열 34) This 열 only appears 만약 "Banking" 또는 "Investing" is 선택 in either 열 8 "포트폴리오s covered by the 목표" 또는 9 "포트폴리오". Refer to the CDP Technical Note on Science-Based 목표 for what qualifies as a science-based 목표 및 how to assess your 목표 against the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브's criteria. 예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - Companies are very strongly encouraged to have their 목표 officially evaluated by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 (SBTi). CDP considers 목표 approved by the 이니셔티브 to reflect best practice in science-based 목표 setting. Select this option only 만약 the 목표 has been officially approved by the SBTi by the CDP scoring deadline. 예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 the 목표 is currently being reviewed by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - 만약 your company has set a 목표 및 has self-assessed it to be science-based, 및 it has been submitted to the SBTi for validation 및 is currently being reviewed by the SBTi, you 해야 합니다 select this option. You 해야 합니다 use the "Please explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항" 열 to 그 이유를 설명 you believe your 목표 to be science-based. 예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 we have committed to seek validation of this 목표 by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 in the next two years - Not all companies have had their 목표 assessed by the SBTi. 만약 your company has set a 목표 및 has self-assessed it to be science-based but has not yet submitted it to the SBTi for validation, you 해야 합니다 select this option. You 해야 합니다 use the "Please explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항" 열 to 그 이유를 설명 you believe your 목표 to be science-based. 만약 you are currently in the 프로세스 of revising your 목표 to meet SBTi criteria, indicate this by selecting "No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years." 예, we consider this a science-based 목표, it has been set in line with the Glasgow Financial Alliance for Net Zero (GFANZ) commitments, 및 we have committed to seek validation by, 또는 it is currently being reviewed by, the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - Many financial institutions committed to accelerating the decarbonization 의 economy do so by joining the GFANZ coalition 및 by primarily setting 목표 based on the GFANZ commitments. 만약 your company has set such a 목표 및 has self-assessed it to be science-based, 및 it has been submitted to the SBTi for validation, 또는 you are in the 프로세스 of doing so, you 해야 합니다 select this option. 예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 it has been set in line with the Glasgow Financial Alliance for Net Zero (GFANZ) commitments, but we have not committed to seek validation by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 within the next two years - Many financial institutions committed to accelerating the decarbonization 의 economy do so by joining the GFANZ coalition 및 by primarily setting 목표 based on the GFANZ commitments. 만약 your company has set such a 목표 및 has self-assessed it to be science-based, but you have not committed to seek validation by SBTi, you 해야 합니다 select this option. No, but we are reporting another 목표 that is science-based - Another 목표 (absolute 또는 intensity) 공개 is science-based, either in another 행 in this table, 또는 in 7.53.2. No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years - It is recommended that your company publicly states this by making a commitment via the SBTi Services Validation Portal. No, 및 we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years - No science-based 목표 have been set 및 there are no plans in place to set one in the next 2 years. 목표 ambition (열 35) This 열 only appears 만약 you select 하나 이상 "예" option in 열 34 "Is this a science-based 목표?". Select the level of ambition of your science-based 목표. Note that as of July 2021 the SBTi currently requires Scope 1 및 2 목표 to be consistent with the level of decarbonization required to keep global temperature increase to 1.5°C compared to pre-industrial temperatures, 및 Scope 3 목표 to be consistent with the level of decarbonization required to keep global temperature increase to well-below 2°C compared to pre-industrial temperatures. 세부 정보를 입력 of your 목표 및 metrics (열 36) This 열 only appears 만약 you select "Adaptation 및 resilience 목표" in 열 2 "목표 type". Provide the metric used 귀사의 목표, as well as 하나 이상 other details. Provide how you measure progress against your 목표, what is the 기준연도 figure against which you compare. Figure in interim year, 만약 해당되는 경우. 하나 이상 other details you wish to provide. Please explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항 (열 37) Provide further details of your 목표 coverage in this 열 및 제외사항. You can use this 열 to identify 여기서 you have a 재무연도 또는 average year based 목표. 만약 your 목표 was originally in a different format, you may wish to give the original 목표 before it was converted into the format required 에 대한 purposes of this table. 만약 your 목표 is part of a wider carbon neutrality goal, a regulatory requirement, 또는 a longer-term 목표, you can also explain this here. 목표 objective (열 38) 설명 the strategic objective 에 대한 목표 및 how it links to your strategy. E.g. the objective 의 목표 may be to meet a regulatory 목표 또는 reduce the costs of compliance with an emissions trading scheme.

guidance.text:
Financial institutions can go further once they have calculated portfolio impact metrics by using the metrics to set targets for reducing their climate change impact and to inform actions they can take to reduce their impact. Reporting on progress through effective environmental disclosures is important at every stage of the journey.
There are a number of methodologies organizations in the financial sector can use to set and/or communicate portfolio targets. Some resources that may help you set and/or communicate a target include:
SBTi - Financial Sector Science-Based Targets Guidance 
Net-Zero Asset Owner Alliance - Target Setting Protocol 
Net-Zero Banking Alliance - Guidelines for Climate Target Setting 
IIGCC - Paris Aligned Investment Initiative
guidance.textKo: Financial institutions can go further once they have calculated 포트폴리오 impact metrics by using the metrics to set 목표 for reducing their climate change impact 및 to inform actions they can take to reduce their impact. Reporting on progress through effective environmental disclosures is important at every stage 의 journey. There are a number of methodologies organizations in the financial sector can use to set 및/또는 communicate 포트폴리오 목표. Some resources that may help you set 및/또는 communicate a 목표 include: SBTi - Financial Sector Science-Based 목표 Guidance Net-Zero Asset Owner Alliance - 목표 Setting Protocol Net-Zero Banking Alliance - Guidelines for Climate 목표 Setting IIGCC - Paris Aligned Investment 이니셔티브

guidance.text: Financial services companies set and progress climate-related targets for lending, investing and/or insuring that align with their commitment to achieve net zero by 2050.
guidance.textKo: Financial services companies set 및 progress climate-related 목표 for lending, investing 및/또는 insuring that align with their commitment to achieve net zero by 2050.

guidance.text:
Year-on-year rolling target: a target to achieve a certain level of performance every year (e.g., a target to reduce scope 1 emissions by 5% compared to the previous year).
Portfolio : in the context of this questionnaire your portfolio is the entire collection of your core financing activities and insurance policies that you offer. For bank lending, this is the entire collection of products and loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For asset managers, this is the entire collection of your products and investments that you hold and/or manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds and investments owned and controlled by your company. For investment portfolios, asset managers should consider discretionary investments, those where the company has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products and insurance policies you provide to your clients.
guidance.textKo: Year-on-year rolling 목표: a 목표 to achieve a certain level of performance every year (e.g., a 목표 to reduce Scope 1 배출량 by 5% compared to the previous year). 포트폴리오 : in the context of this questionnaire your 포트폴리오 is the entire collection of your core financing activities 및 insurance policies that you offer. For bank lending, this is the entire collection of products 및 loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For 자산운용사, this is the entire collection of your products 및 investments that you hold 및/또는 manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds 및 investments owned 및 controlled by your company. For investment 포트폴리오s, 자산운용사 해야 합니다 consider discretionary investments, those 여기서 the company has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products 및 insurance policies you provide to your clients.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed excluding the following columns:
- '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'
- 'End of interim target year'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
- 'Figure in interim target year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 13/13 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 아래 열을 제외하고, 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 'End of interim 목표 year' - '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' - 'Figure in interim 목표 year' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 13/13점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Awareness points:
At least 10 Disclosure points awarded AND
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is not before date provided in column 'End date of base year'
i) Either of the following met - 2 points
'No' selected in column 'We have an interim target' AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 4 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set'
OR
'Yes' selected in column 'We have an interim target' AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 4 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is greater than date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND less than date provided in 'End date of target'.
ii) Any option excluding 'No, and we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 1 point
iii) Figure greater than 0 provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' OR
'New' selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' AND date provided in column 'Date target was set' is the same as date provided in column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 OR
The figure provided in column 'Figure in base year' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Figure in target year' OR
The figure provided in column 'Figure in target year' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Figure in reporting year' - 2 points
iv) Any of the following met - 1 point
'Sector level' selected in column 'Target is set and progress against it is tracked at' AND column 'Sector' completed OR
'Portfolio level' selected in column 'Target is set and progress against it is tracked at' AND column 'Portfolio' completed OR
'Asset class level' selected in column 'Target is set and progress against it is tracked at' AND column 'Asset classes covered by the target' completed.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this question.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for Awareness 점: 최소 10 Disclosure 점 awarded 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is not before date 입력 in 열 'End date of 기준연도' i) Either 의 following met - 2 점 '아니요' 선택 in 열 'We have an interim 목표' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 또는 '예' 선택 in 열 'We have an interim 목표' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'End of interim 목표 year' is 초과 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 미만 date 입력 in 'End date of 목표'. ii) 하나 이상 option 제외 'No, 및 we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 1 점 iii) Figure 초과 0 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 또는 'New' 선택 in 열 '목표 status in 보고연도' 그리고 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is the same as date 입력 in 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 또는 The figure 입력 in 열 'Figure in 기준연도' is equal to the figure 입력 in 열 'Figure in 목표 year' 또는 The figure 입력 in 열 'Figure in 목표 year' is equal to the figure 입력 in 열 'Figure in 보고연도' - 2 점 iv) 하나 이상 의 following met - 1 점 'Sector level' 선택 in 열 '목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at' 그리고 열 'Sector' 완성 또는 '포트폴리오 level' 선택 in 열 '목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at' 그리고 열 '포트폴리오' 완성 또는 'Asset class level' 선택 in 열 '목표 is set 및 progress against it is tracked at' 그리고 열 'Asset classes covered by the 목표' 완성. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다. One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
Any of the following must be selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' to be eligible for Management points:
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
ROUTE A)
i) Any option excluding 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' OR 'No, and we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 0.5 points
ii) Any option excluding ‘Portfolio coverage' OR ‘Portfolio temperature rating target' selected in column ‘Target type' AND Either of the following met - 0.5 points:
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after Date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We have an interim target' AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is between 5 and 10 years after Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route
ROUTE B)
i) Any option excluding 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' OR 'No, and we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 0.5 points
ii) ‘Portfolio coverage' OR ‘Portfolio temperature rating target' selected in column ‘Target type' AND Any of the following met - 0.5 points:
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 30/06/2031 or earlier AND Date provided in column 'End date of target' is greater than Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 5 years or earlier after Date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND Date provided in column 'End date of target' is greater than Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is after 30/06/2031 AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We have an interim target' AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is 30/06/2031 or earlier AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is after the Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is after 30/06/2031 AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We have an interim target' AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is 5 years or earlier after Date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is after the Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route
ROUTE C)
i) Any option excluding 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' OR 'No, and we do not anticipate setting one in the next 2 years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 0.5 points
ii) Any option other than ‘Portfolio coverage' OR ‘Portfolio temperature rating target' selected in column ‘Target type' AND Either of the following met- 0.5 points:
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 5 years or earlier than the Date provided in column 'Date target was set'
OR
‘Yes' selected in column ‘We have a interim target' AND
Date provided in column 'End of interim target year' is 5 years or earlier than date provided in column 'Date target was set'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
'Yes' selected in column 'Does your organization undertake this activity?' in row 'Insurance underwriting (insurance company)' AND 'No' selected in column 'Does your organization undertake this activity?' in the following rows in question 1.10 - 0/0 points:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owners)'
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
One row scored.

0.5 점 ii) 하나 이상 option other than ‘포트폴리오 coverage' 또는 ‘포트폴리오 temperature rating 목표' 선택 in 열 ‘목표 type' 그리고 Either 의 following met- 0.5 점: Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 5 years 또는 earlier than the Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 또는 ‘예' 선택 in 열 ‘We have a interim 목표' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'End of interim 목표 year' is 5 years 또는 earlier than date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 D) '예' 선택 in 열 'Does 귀사 undertake this activity?' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (insurance company)' 그리고 '아니요' 선택 in 열 'Does 귀사 undertake this activity?' in the following 행 in 문항 1.10 - change.question_ko: [국문 번역 검토 필요] Provide details of the climate-related targets for your portfolio.
change.q2025_text: Provide details of the climate-related targets for your portfolio.
change.detail_change_types: New dropdown option, Removed dropdown option, New dropdown option, Modified guidance
change.change_summary:
Removed options "Absolute portfolio emissions" and "Portfolio emissions intensity" and replaced with option "Portoflio emissions".
Added dropdown option 'Other, please specify' for target type: "Portfolio emissions".
Added guidance for option "Yes, and this target has been approved by the Science Based Targets initiative" to clarify SBTs can be approved by the scoring deadline. Added guidance for option "No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years " updating disclosers to state their commitment in the SBTi portal and not through a letter as this is not being used anymore.
change.scoring_change_summary: CC Financial services Management • Eligibility criteria updated to apply to all routes. • Two new routes have been added for variations in interim targets. Scoring updated with regard to the length of targets disclosed. New proposed ROUTE A and B are aligned with near term SBTi criteria. ROUTE C is aligned with FINZs.
change.daml_summary: Financial services: D 13/13 | A 6/6 | M 0 or 1/0 or 1 | L 0 or 2/0 or 2
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked

change.change_summaryKo: Removed options "Absolute 포트폴리오 emissions" 및 "포트폴리오 배출집약도" 및 replaced with option "Portoflio emissions". Added dropdown option 'Other, 직접 입력' for 목표 type: "포트폴리오 emissions". Added guidance for option "예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브" to clarify SBTs can be approved by the scoring deadline. Added guidance for option "No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years " updating disclosers to state their commitment in the SBTi portal 및 not through a letter as this is not being used anymore.
change.scoring_change_summaryKo: CC Financial services Management • Eligibility criteria updated to apply to all 경로s. • Two new 경로s have been added for variations in interim 목표. Scoring updated with regard to the length of 목표 공개. New proposed 경로 A 및 B are aligned with near term SBTi criteria. 경로 C is aligned with FINZs.

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

simpleHelpKo: Achieving net zero by 2050 will require a major redirection of capital into sustainable solutions 및 low-carbon technologies, which only the financial services sector can provide. This profound influence on the wider economy means financial institutions' climate-related impact occurs mostly in their 포트폴리오s, rather than through their 직접 운영사업장. Thus, setting 목표 및 reporting on progress at a 포트폴리오 level is considered best practice for financial institutions 및 can help them align their financing, investment 및 insurance underwriting to a 1.5ºC world.
